questions.correctText: Foundations of American Democracy
choices: describing a topic without explaining why it matters
disciplinary reasoning
Foundations of American Democracy
memorizing an isolated fact without evidence
questions.explanation: Foundations of American Democracy is a core idea in Foundations of American Democracy. The related standard asks students to connect the concept to evidence, process, or application rather than treat it as a loose vocabulary word.
